race.description: Tle Thanks Tiger Light Midway Handicap (C1)
race.comment: SHE'S ASSORT (4) progressed nicely last start to finish a close third over 900m at Newcastle. Peaks now and ran her best number here over 1000m. The gate is awkward but she's well placed to win. CHARLINA (2) resumes for the local Beer yard and has won fresh. Rates well off the near miss this trip at Moruya two back and she has plenty of scope for improvement. Will get every chance from an inside barrier. Stablemate HARRY THE THIEF (1) was tipped out after an impressive Wyong Maiden win of debut. Has the paint and wasn't far away in a recent Goulburn trial. Keep a close eye on the betting. FINE WINE (7) resumes off a Gosford Maiden win. Has a small a 2kg claim and will be naturally improved. The speedy filly has an outside barrier, so will need luck. Ditto INFANT WARRIOR (3) who can build on the short-price Hawkesbury Maiden win.
